task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Media Settings page, the 'Width' and 'Height' fields under 'Thumbnail size' are both set to '200'.

task_completion.description: Disable the organization of uploads into month- and year-based folders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Media Settings page, the checkbox for 'Organize my uploads into month- and year-based folders' is unchecked.

task_completion.description: Permanently delete the images 'Promo Banner Spring 2024', 'Black Friday Sale Old', and 'Holiday Greetings 2023'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Media Library, the three specified images are selected for deletion, a deletion confirmation is shown, or they are visibly absent from the media grid/list.

task_completion.description: Update the Alternative Text for 'Headshot CEO Sarah'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the attachment details for 'Headshot CEO Sarah', the 'Alternative Text' field is set to 'Headshot of CEO Sarah Jenkins smiling'.

task_completion.description: Update the Alternative Text for 'Accessibility Diagram v2'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the attachment details for 'Accessibility Diagram v2', the 'Alternative Text' field is set to 'Diagram showing WCAG contrast ratio requirements'.

task_completion.description: Update the Alternative Text for 'New York Office Lobby'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the attachment details for 'New York Office Lobby', the 'Alternative Text' field is set to 'Modern office lobby with reception desk and plants'.

task_completion.description: Update the Alternative Text for 'Quarterly Revenue Chart'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the attachment details for 'Quarterly Revenue Chart', the 'Alternative Text' field is set to 'Bar chart showing Q3 revenue growth of 15 percent'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the application's GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking on settings, checkboxes, and media items in the web interface, rather than using terminal commands or scripts to modify the database directly.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the settings changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: A 'Settings saved' confirmation message or the 'Save Changes' button being clicked is visible after modifying the thumbnail size and folder organization.

integrity.description: The agent used the interface to delete the images.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Delete Permanently' button being clicked or a bulk action being applied to the specific images.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected settings: Thumbnail width and height must be exactly 200. 'Organize my uploads into month- and year-based folders' must be unchecked. Deleted images: 'Promo Banner Spring 2024', 'Black Friday Sale Old', 'Holiday Greetings 2023'. Required Alt Texts: 'Headshot CEO Sarah' -> 'Headshot of CEO Sarah Jenkins smiling', 'Accessibility Diagram v2' -> 'Diagram showing WCAG contrast ratio requirements', 'New York Office Lobby' -> 'Modern office lobby with reception desk and plants', 'Quarterly Revenue Chart' -> 'Bar chart showing Q3 revenue growth of 15 percent'.
